hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [[ -z "$file" ]] && exit 0; echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(jsx|tsx|css|html)$' || exit 0; bad=$(grep -oE 'font-size:[[:space:]]*[0-9]+px' "$file" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/font-size:[[:space:]]*//' | sed 's/px//' | awk '{if ($1+0 < 11 && $1+0 > 0) print $1}' | tr '\n' ' '); [[ -z "$bad" ]] && exit 0; echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"LEGIBILITY WARNING: font-size below 11px in $(basename $file): ${bad}px. Min: 11px labels, 13px body, 15px readable content.\"}"
